app.name: OpenWA
app.one_liner: OpenWA is a free, open-source, self-hosted WhatsApp API Gateway that provides full control over messaging infrastructure without vendor lock-in.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Manage WhatsApp sessions, webhooks, and API keys through a visual interface.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist configuration or session data using pluggable storage backends (Local/S3).

mvp_plan: week 1: Create basic REST API endpoints for WhatsApp messaging
week 1: Implement pluggable adapter interfaces for database/storage/cache
week 1: Set up NestJS 11 project with TypeScript 5
acceptance_tests: System starts successfully in Docker with Node 22 LTS and zero configuration.
User can swap between SQLite and PostgreSQL via config without code changes.
